title: Freelance
description: Identity, advertising design and digital content on commission for SMBs, institutions and consumer brands.
challenge: Solving commissions of very different natures — identity, advertising, content — for clients with diverse structures, timelines and budgets.
objective: Deliver every project with judgment and studio-level processes, regardless of the client's scale.
role: Independent Graphic and Advertising Designer, collaborating with development and production teams on multidisciplinary projects.
strategy: Treat every commission as a business problem: diagnosis, proposal and execution with clear deliverables and scope.

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: Understanding the business, its audience and the real problem behind the commission.

process.title: Proposal
process.description: Creative direction and scope defined before producing.

process.title: Execution & delivery
process.description: Production, iteration with the client and delivery of organized final files.

results.summary: An independent practice sustained for more than seven years and a network of recurring clients.

caseStudies.title: URBN
caseStudies.description: Visual identity and advertising pieces for the brand, built on a system that holds up in every application.
caseStudies.challenge: Giving the brand its own visual system, with clear hierarchy and application rules, working equally well on social media and in print.
caseStudies.objective: Deliver an identity usable from day one: not a loose logo, but a system the business can run without depending on the designer.
caseStudies.role: Identity design, art direction and production of the advertising pieces.
caseStudies.strategy: Define the rules first —typography, colour, grid, tone— and only then produce; that way every new piece solves itself and the brand compounds instead of scattering.

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: Understanding the business, its audience and the real problem behind the commission.

process.title: Visual system
process.description: Defining the identity's principles and application rules.

process.title: Production
process.description: Design of the advertising pieces under the system, with organised final files.

caseStudies.title: Pragmático CR
caseStudies.description: Digital content and communication pieces for social media, with a visual language that stays consistent over time.
caseStudies.challenge: Sustaining a constant digital presence without every post looking like a different brand.
caseStudies.objective: Produce recognisable, repeatable content the business could keep up at its own pace.
caseStudies.role: Art direction and design of the digital content and communication pieces.
caseStudies.strategy: Templates and composition criteria that allow fast production without losing identity, leaving room for each campaign's message.

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: Review of the existing communication and the formats the business actually uses.

process.title: Content system
process.description: Repeatable templates and composition rules for day-to-day work.

process.title: Production
process.description: Design of the pieces and organised delivery for publishing.

caseStudies.title: Coco Estudio
caseStudies.description: Building the studio's visual identity: from the concept to the applications that give it body.
caseStudies.challenge: Translating the studio's personality into a visual system that felt its own and not generic.
caseStudies.objective: An identity with judgment: memorable, applicable and coherent across every touchpoint.
caseStudies.role: Visual identity design and art direction of its applications.
caseStudies.strategy: Start from the concept, not the form: define what the brand had to communicate before deciding how it looked.

process.title: Concept
process.description: Defining the idea behind the identity and its visual territory.

process.title: Identity
process.description: Designing the system: mark, typography, colour and usage rules.

process.title: Applications
process.description: Bringing the system down to the pieces where the brand lives.

caseStudies.title: Municipalidad de Pococí
caseStudies.description: Institutional communication pieces designed to inform a broad, diverse audience with clarity.
caseStudies.challenge: Communicating institutional information to a very broad audience, where clarity matters more than graphic flourish.
caseStudies.objective: Legible, ordered pieces that convey the information without noise and uphold the institution's seriousness.
caseStudies.role: Design of the institutional communication pieces and their application system.
caseStudies.strategy: Hierarchy before decoration: clear typographic structure, sufficient contrast and a system any new piece can follow.

process.title: Ordering
process.description: Prioritising the information each piece has to communicate.

process.title: System
process.description: Typographic and composition structure applicable across the communication.

process.title: Production
process.description: Design and delivery of the pieces for their different channels.

seo.title: Freelance — Independent projects · Adrián D. Bonilla
seo.description: Identity, advertising design and digital content on commission for SMBs, institutions and consumer brands since 2018.
